LanguageData.VFET_Agriculture.description: Learn to grow various staple crops. Unlocks growing job.
LanguageData.VFET_Agriculture.label: agriculture
LanguageData.VFET_AnimalHandling.description: Acquire the knowledge to manage, tame, and accommodate animals. Unlocks handing job, as well as animal taming and slaughtering.
LanguageData.VFET_AnimalHandling.label: animal handling
LanguageData.VFET_Bow.description: Unlock the ability to craft the staple of ranged combat - a short bow.
LanguageData.VFET_Bow.label: bow
LanguageData.VFET_Construction.description: Learn the absolute basic techniques of building and structural design. Unlocks the ability to build walls and roofs.
LanguageData.VFET_Construction.label: construction
LanguageData.VFET_Cultivation.description: Expand crop variety with more specific, difficult to grow plants, such as smokeleaf or psychoid plant.
LanguageData.VFET_Cultivation.label: cultivation
LanguageData.VFET_Culture.description: Unlock the ability to conduct research, as well as develop ideological thoughts. Unlocks intellectual job.
LanguageData.VFET_Culture.label: culture
LanguageData.VFET_Fire.description: Unlock the capability to utilize and manage fire for various purposes. Unlocks firefighting job.
LanguageData.VFET_Fire.label: fire
LanguageData.VFET_Furniture.description: Introduce basic furniture crafting for improved living conditions.
LanguageData.VFET_Furniture.label: furniture
LanguageData.VFET_Hunting.description: Establish methods for effective hunting and resource processing. Unlocks hunting job and allows you to craft throwspikes.
LanguageData.VFET_Hunting.label: hunting
LanguageData.VFET_Medicine.label: medicine
LanguageData.VFET_Mining.description: Develop methods to extract resources from the earth using force. Unlocks mining job.
LanguageData.VFET_Mining.label: mining
LanguageData.VFET_Tribalwear.description: Learn to craft traditional tribal attire for various purposes.
LanguageData.VFET_Tribalwear.label: tribalwear
LanguageData.VFET_Weapons.description: Introduce basic weaponry for defense against enemies.
LanguageData.VFET_Weapons.label: weapons
LanguageData.VFET_Agriculture.generalRules.rulesStrin: subject_story->turned from the nomadic life to sow the seeds of the future
subject_story->nurtured the earth to yield bountiful harvests, ensuring prosperity
subject_story->founded the first settlements, around which communities flourished
LanguageData.VFET_AnimalHandling.generalRules.rulesSt: subject->the bond between beast and kin
subject_story->formed alliances with the animal kingdom, taming the wild for companionship and aid
subject_story->harnessed the strength of beasts, elevating their tribe's potential
subject_story->merged their destiny with that of their animal brethren, securing a mutual survival
LanguageData.VFET_Bow.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->stretched the bowstring of progress, launching arrows towards the horizon
LanguageData.VFET_Bow.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->mastered the bow, blending patience, skill, and technology
LanguageData.VFET_Bow.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->ushered in the era of ranged combat, shifting the dynamics of the hunt and warfare
LanguageData.VFET_Construction.generalRules.rulesStri: subject_story->raised the first walls against the elements, crafting sanctuaries from the wild
subject_story->assembled places of gathering and rest, fostering community and safety
subject_story->embarked on the architectural journey, laying the cornerstone of progress
LanguageData.VFET_Cultivation.generalRules.rulesStrin: subject_story->explored the cultivation of exotic plants, enriching diets and medicine
subject_story->braved the cultivation of finicky crops, securing a variety of sustenance
subject_story->expanded the agricultural horizon, embracing the wealth of nature’s bounty
LanguageData.VFET_Culture.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->wove the fabric of their culture, rich with the threads of knowledge and belief
LanguageData.VFET_Culture.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->cultivated the growth of intellectual pursuits, seeding the future with ideas
LanguageData.VFET_Culture.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->embarked on the quest for understanding, elevating their tribe with wisdom
LanguageData.VFET_Fire.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->harnessed the primal force of fire, illuminating the darkness and warming the cold
LanguageData.VFET_Fire.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->transformed the night into a time of activity and safety, warding off predators
LanguageData.VFET_Fire.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->laid the foundation of civilization with the control of this wild element
LanguageData.VFET_Furniture.generalRules.rulesStrings: subject_story->carved the first symbols of comfort and utility from the heartwood of nature
subject_story->transformed living spaces with the artistry of handcrafted furniture
subject_story->elevated daily life, from survival to living, through the touch of creation
LanguageData.VFET_Hunting.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->honed the primal dance of predator and prey, ensuring the tribe’s sustenance
LanguageData.VFET_Hunting.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->crafted the tools of the chase, bringing skill to the wild’s challenge
LanguageData.VFET_Hunting.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->secured their place atop the food chain, through cunning and craft
subject_story->unveiled the curative powers of nature, blending herbs into the first remedies
subject_story->soothed the ails of their kin with poultices and potions, birthed from the wild
subject_story->paved the path for the healing arts, bridging the gap between ailment and health
subject_gerund->weaving the first threads of wellness
LanguageData.VFET_Mining.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->delved into the belly of the earth to claim its hidden riches
LanguageData.VFET_Mining.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->crafted the first tools to pierce stone, revealing the minerals within
LanguageData.VFET_Mining.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->laid the groundwork for advancements with the raw materials of progress
LanguageData.VFET_Tribalwear.generalRules.rulesString: subject_story->fashioned attire that spoke of culture and safeguarded against the harsh world
subject_story->blended functionality with tradition, clothing the spirit of their people
subject_story->crafted garments that would become the hallmark of their tribe’s identity
subject_gerund->dressing the essence of a people
LanguageData.VFET_Weapons.generalRules.rulesStrings.1: subject_story->forged the first weapons, steeling their tribe against threats
LanguageData.VFET_Weapons.generalRules.rulesStrings.2: subject_story->balanced the scales of nature and conflict with the craft of armament
LanguageData.VFET_Weapons.generalRules.rulesStrings.3: subject_story->ensured their survival through the innovation of defense and offense
